message:
style(fuzz): rustfmt fuzz_client_tracking + add caching:None to expected_state

Two small follow-ups on the client-tracking fuzz target after the
ClientTrackingState.caching field landed in fr-store.

fuzz/fuzz_targets/fuzz_client_tracking.rs:

- rustfmt collapses the multi-line CLIENT_TRACKING_OPTIN_OPTOUT_
  CONFLICT and CLIENT_CACHING_REQUIRES_TRACKING declarations to
  single lines so cargo fmt stops flagging them.
- expected_state now initialises caching: None across every
  ClientTrackingState construction arm (plain-on, BCAST, OPTIN,
  and all the fallback paths). Without this, the shadow model
  would compare against the default-pre-caching-field struct and
  diverge from fr-store's real ClientTrackingState in any
  round-trip that produced an enabled tracking state.
